headline: Block’s New Franchise Wins Test Square’s Role As Core Commerce Platform
summary: Block's Square platform has secured Magnolia Soap & Bath Co. as a client to support its franchise operations across more than 50 locations. The Hat is using Square's restaurant solutions as it expands into out of state markets for the first time. These wins highlight Square's role as a unified commerce platform for retailers and restaurants with complex, multi site footprints.
